Anthropic just pulled Claude Code from the Pro plan. Pro users wanting it need Max now. $100/month minimum. 5x jump. I'm on Max 20x so I'm fine. Flagging for anyone on Pro who's about to find out. No announcement. Just a pricing page edit. https://t.co/sNxZKHh367

## Install
```bash
python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
```

## Usage
```bash
python3 main.py
```
